description: A business customer wants to order office furniture. They discuss quantity, quality, and price.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: A business customer arrives to buy office furniture.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Good morning. Welcome to our shop. What can I do for you?
lines.zh: 早上好，欢迎光临。有什么可以帮到您的？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: I need to buy some office furniture. Can you show me around?
lines.zh: 我需要买一些办公家具。能带我看看吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Sure. These are our office tables and computer desks.
lines.zh: 当然。这些是我们的办公台和电脑桌。

scenes.description: The customer picks computer desks and chairs.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: I want to buy this computer desk. What is it made of?
lines.zh: 我想买这张电脑桌。它是什么材质的？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This one is made of MDF, but we have the same style in plywood.
lines.zh: 这款是中纤板的，但我们有同款胶合板的。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: I also need boss chairs. What colors do you have?
lines.zh: 我还需要老板椅。有什么颜色？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We have blue, black and red. You can choose leather, fabric or PU leather.
lines.zh: 有蓝色、黑色和红色。您可以选择皮革、布艺或PU皮。

scenes.description: They confirm how many pieces the customer wants.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: How many desks and chairs do you want to buy?
lines.zh: 您想买多少张桌子和椅子？

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: I want 100 computer desks and 100 boss chairs.
lines.zh: 我要100张电脑桌和100张老板椅。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: That's a large order. We can offer a better price.
lines.zh: 这是大宗订单。我们可以给更优惠的价格。

scenes.description: The customer asks about quality and durability.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: How long can this chair last?
lines.zh: 这把椅子能用多久？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It can last for at least ten years if you use it in the right way.
lines.zh: 如果使用得当，至少可以用十年。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Your quality is the best among the suppliers I have visited.
lines.zh: 在我参观过的供应商中，你们的质量是最好的。

scenes.description: They negotiate the price for the large order.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: The desk is 700 RMB and the chair is 500 RMB.
lines.zh: 桌子700元，椅子500元。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: This price is too high for such a big order. How about 600 for the desk and 400 for the chair?
lines.zh: 这么大的订单，这个价格太高了。桌子600、椅子400怎么样？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Sorry, that's lower than our wholesale price. 650 and 450 is the best we can do.
lines.zh: 抱歉，这低于我们的批发价。650和450是我们能给的最低价。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: OK, then we have a deal.
lines.zh: 好的，成交。

scenes.description: They agree to visit the factory before finalizing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Can I visit your factory before I place the order?
lines.zh: 下单前我可以参观你们的工厂吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Of course. We can pick you up anytime.
lines.zh: 当然可以。我们随时可以接送。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: How about tomorrow morning?
lines.zh: 明天上午怎么样？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Tomorrow morning is fine. I'll show you around our workshop.
lines.zh: 明天上午可以。我带您参观我们的车间。
